_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill of identifying, capturing, containing, and reporting malware.
reference_document_element_description: Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses, output filtering, access controls, and audit logging.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.454), DQ-S-006 (DQ, cosine: 0.439).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.8/10 (raw 0.383). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [capturing, containing, identifying, malware, reporting, skill] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, ai, application, audit, controls, defenses] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.897, R=0.856). P exceeds R by 0.041 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 16 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.1%, N:57.8%, C:42.1%). No dominant classification for "Skill of identifying, capturing, containing, and reporting malware." vs "Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses," — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.468 > STS 0.383 (gap +0.086). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.5%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [capturing, containing, identifying, malware, reporting, skill]. WIDAI terms: [access, ai, application, audit, controls, defenses].
